title: RedoxFormer Dataset: Run-to-Failure Power Density Data for Early-Stage Degradation Detection in Solid Oxide Fuel Cells
description: This dataset contains experimental run-to-failure time-series measurements collected from accelerated nickel redox-cycling degradation tests on laboratory-scale Solid Oxide Fuel Cells (SOFCs). The dataset includes continuous power density signals sampled at 1 Hz from 10 independent fuel cells operating under diverse conditions. The data were generated to support research in early-stage fault detection, prognostics, and machine learning for energy systems.
